name: PivotMarkets.ai
description: Sovereign AI Infrastructure for Regional Economic Resilience

sovereign_protocol.definition: Sovereign AI Infrastructure designed to equip Indiana's workforce, secure regional data, and turn manual work into scalable ROI while preserving local economic control.
principles: Human-Centered AI: Equip people, don't replace them
Regional Data Sovereignty: Local data residency prevents global digital extraction
Agentic Governance: Human-in-the-Loop oversight ensures auditable, reliable AI
Logic Architect Certification: Local veterans govern AI outputs
Dual-Hub Model: Chamber-led Industrial Hub + Library-led Public Hub

maker_triad.protocol: Nappanee Protocol - Sovereign RAG for proprietary woodworking logic
Jasper Framework - Furniture engineering data residency
Warsaw Protocol - Medical device specification security

precision_triad.protocol: Columbus Framework - Precision manufacturing AI governance

ai_capabilities.sovereign_rag: Retrieval-Augmented Generation grounded in local, private data troves
ai_capabilities.human_in_loop_governance: AI outputs governed by certified Logic Architects
ai_capabilities.regional_data_residency: All business data remains within Indiana borders
ai_capabilities.agentic_workflows: Practitioner-led AI logic for specific regional industries
ai_capabilities.grant_stacking: Integration of READI 2.0, Manufacturing Readiness, and Cloud Credits

key_findings.model_convergence: Top model performance converged within 2.7% margin
key_findings.cost_advantage: DeepSeek V4-Pro delivers 21x cost reduction vs. Claude Opus 4.7
key_findings.implication: Frontier-level intelligence now achievable at regional scale with sovereign infrastructure

sovereign_bastion.middle_ring: Three Moats Defense (The Trove, The Refinery, Logic Architect)
sovereign_bastion.core: Differentiated Moat (Your Data, Your Workflows, Your Local Expertise)

schema_implementation.tech_article: Sovereign Bastion component wrapped in TechArticle schema
schema_implementation.scholarly_article: Protocol linked to Stanford AI Index
schema_implementation.news_article: Newsroom entries with datePublished for freshness signals
schema_implementation.person_schema: Founder bio linked to company, GitHub, IEDC initiatives
